Haida Gwaii (Queen Charlotte Islands)

Haida Gwaii offers some of the world’s most spectacular scenery. Helijet has the experience and equipment to make the most out of your experience in the archipelago.

Whether it’s ongoing forestry and mining industry aerial support, business/government charters, whisking guests off to remote fishing resorts or guiding a sightseeing adventure over the unparalleled, North Coast scenery, Helijet has the personnel and equipment to deliver.
From our base at Sandspit Airport, Helijet offers:

  • 13 passenger twin-engine Sikorsky S76 helicopters available seasonally mid-May to mid-September.
  • 5 passenger AS350B2 or AS350B3 helicopters available year-round for utility or leisure charters.

column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text]For custom charter quotes, bookings, or for more information on how Helijet can help enhance your Haida Gwaii experience, please contact:

Helijet Haida Gwaii

Andrew Scott, Base Manager
PO Box 333
Sandspit, BC V0T 1T0
ascott [at] helijet.it.com
+1.250.637.5344
Toll-Free: 1.877.569.4354[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_column_text text_direction=”default”]From mid-May to mid-September, Helijet is pleased to be involved with Haida Gwaii’s premier fishing resort destinations, shuttling guests and their catches between Sandspit, Masset and their resort:

• Queen Charlotte Lodge
• Langara Fishing Lodge
• The West Coast Fishing Club
• Peregrine Lodge
• Langara Island Lodge
• Eagle Pointe Lodge

Tammi Lim – Manager, Resort Opertations

Prince Rupert

British Columbia’s rugged North Coast is blessed with an abundance of natural resources and outstanding scenery. Experience, comfort and convenience await as Helijet opens the door to the wilds of the North Coast from its Seal Cove base in Prince Rupert.

column_border_width=”none” column_border_style=”solid”][vc_column_text text_direction=”default”]Whether you’re seeking natural resource or industrial aerial support, custom private charters, wilderness / fishing resort transfers or guiding sightseeing or leisure adventures over the rugged North Coast, Helijet has the personnel and equipment to deliver.

From our base at Prince Rupert’s Seal Cove Aerodrome, Helijet offers utility and leisure charter flights with:

  • 12 passenger twin-engine Sikorsky S76 helicopters available seasonally.
  • 5 passenger AS350B2 or AS350B3 helicopters available year-round

Seal Cove is also the home of Helijet’s North Coast air medical operations. Working on behalf of the British Columbia Ambulance Services, Helijet provides a Sikorsky S76 air ambulance and staff dedicated to 24/7 service to Prince Rupert and the communities of the North Coast.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_column_text]For custom charter quotes, booking or for more information on how Helijet can help enhance or support your North Coast experience, please contact:

Helijet Prince Rupert

Base Pilot
2595 Seal Cove Road
Prince Rupert, BC V8J 3P4

Bella Bella

Each Summer, from mid-May to mid-September, Helijet is based in the beautiful coastal community of Bella Bella to help shuttle passengers to the first-class fishing resorts;

  • North King Lodge
  • King Pacific Lodge

For more information on operations on British Columbia’s Central Coast contact:
Tammi Lim – Manager, Resort Operation
